name: checkpoint verifier confirms the signature against the configured signing key
command: mkdir -p compliance/audit-checkpoints && printf '{"merkle_root":"abc","signature":"valid","included_events":1}\n' > compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-1.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/checkpoint-verify.sh" --checkpoint compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-1.json --signing-stub valid 2>out.txt && grep -q 'signature_verified=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
